creator: bmah@ca.sandia.gov
text:
Fix: Here's a context diff to bring the US Netscape Communicator port up to 4.06,
using the Linux binary (as previous versions).  The new port
uses the standard version (instead of the professional version), due
to slightly less restrictive licensing terms.  For 4.06, the differences
are that the professional version adds the calendar and auto-configuration
plugins.  The TN3270 support appears to be missing from both versions.
We also fix a cosmetic typo in the Makefile.
